author: lixingyu41
description: Open additional File Explorer tabs rooted to a specific folder. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: lixingyu
manifest.description: Open additional File Explorer tabs rooted to a specific folder.
manifest.name: Set to Root

name: Set to Root

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Set to Root 0.1.9

This release contains the Obsidian plugin build artifacts for version 0.1.9.

Included assets:
- `main.js`: bundled plugin entry point
- `manifest.json`: plugin metadata
- `styles.css`: plugin styles

GitHub artifact attestations are generated for each release asset so users can verify the assets were built from this repository.
releases.name: Set to Root 0.1.9
